visual-baseline-missing.reason: Visual regression requires reviewed baselines. Missing baselines are review items, not product bugs.

crawler-output-missing.reason: Crawler-derived fixtures are optional release-with-crawl inputs. Missing crawler output is a non-blocking review item.

crawler-source-of-truth-false.reason: Crawler output from public UI is candidate data, not a true source of truth.

performance-threshold-warning.reason: Performance threshold drift is a review item unless core content is broken.
performance-threshold-warning.pattern: performance threshold|threshold exceeded|p95|slow request|slow response|stability warning

third-party-performance-warning.reason: Third-party analytics/ad failures should not block release unless core content is affected.

stage-prod-data-drift.reason: Stage and production may differ in data freshness or assets.
